name: supports_time_datetime
description: Extract dates from <time datetime='ISO-8601'> elements in HTML. Many Swedish sites use HTML5 time tags with machine-readable dates.

name: supports_swedish_date_text
description: Parse Swedish date formats like '7 april 2026' or '26 april' from page text when dates aren't in URLs or time-tags.

name: anchor_plus_nearby_date
description: For event list pages where date is in sibling/parent text node rather than URL. Extract anchor text + nearby date text as event pair.
notes: Risk: nearby text may be navigation, not event date

name: article_card_detection
description: Detect event cards within <article> or .event-card class elements. Extract title from h2/h3, date from nested time-tag or text.

name: js_shell_detection
description: Detect pages that are JS-rendered shells (no <main>, few links, only nav). Classify as D-renderGate candidate without trying HTML extraction.
notes: Already implemented in run-batch-001.ts - moves likelyJsRendered sources to D-queue

name: subpage_required_before_c
description: Some sites have event content only on subpages, not root. C0 discovery must find candidate subpage URLs before C1/C2 can succeed.
notes: C0 exists but may need improvement in URL pattern matching

name: list_item_event_blocks
description: Detect events in <li> items that contain both a link and a date-like string. Common in calendar widgets and agenda lists.

name: fetch_before_extract
description: Always fetch HTML first, then pass HTML string to extractFromHtml. Previously batch scripts passed URL strings directly causing 0 events.
notes: Bug fix, not a new feature. Both batch scripts now fetch HTML first.
